# Vikas Jaiswal — Java Spring Boot Backend Developer Portfolio

> Vikas Jaiswal is a Java Spring Boot Backend Developer with 4+ years of professional experience building secure, scalable enterprise backend systems. Based in Mumbai, India. Available for backend engineering roles.

## Identity

- Role: Java Spring Boot Backend Developer
- Experience: 4+ years (since February 2022)
- Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Current Employer: WEQ Technologies, Mumbai
- Availability: Open to work — remote, hybrid, or on-site

## Core Technical Skills
- **Backend:** Java 8, Java 17, Java 21, Spring Boot 3, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, REST APIs, WebSocket (STOMP), Webhooks
- **Security:** Spring Security, JWT, OAuth2, RBAC, @PreAuthorize, Parameterized Queries, AWS Parameter Store
- **Database:** MS SQL Server, MySQL, JPA/JPQL, Query Optimization, Indexing, Stored Procedures, DDD Schema Design
- **Performance:** Multithreading, @Async, Java Streams API, Spring Scheduler, ETL Pipelines (Python)
- **Cloud & DevOps:** AWS S3, CI/CD Pipelines, Maven, Git, GitHub, Swagger/OpenAPI, Linux CLI
- **Frontend:** React, Angular, Thymeleaf
- **SDKs & APIs:** Kite Connect (Zerodha), Razorpay, FCM V1, WhatsApp Business API, 100MS SDK, iText7, YouTube Data API

## Professional Experience

### Software Developer — WEQ Technologies, Mumbai (Jul 2025 – Present)
- Engineered Zerodha Kite Connect OAuth integration and real-time market data streaming via WebSocket (STOMP)
- Designed trade management system: entry, exit, stop-loss, and bracket orders with Webhook-based sync
- Implemented granular RBAC using Spring Security @PreAuthorize across 30+ multi-tenant modules
- Built multi-channel async notification engine: FCM V1, WhatsApp Business API, SMTP
- Integrated 100MS SDK with per-room JWT token generation
- Automated PDF invoice generation with iText7 + Thymeleaf, stored on AWS S3
- Replaced HQL string concatenation with parameterized queries — eliminated SQL injection surface
- Tech: Java 17, Spring Boot, Spring Security, JWT, Kite Connect SDK, WebSocket, AWS S3, Razorpay

### Database Engineer & Backend Developer — Medify Nexus, Mumbai (Jan 2024 – Jul 2025)
- Built JWT-secured REST APIs for healthcare platform — reduced integration time by 40%
- Boosted API throughput 30% and cut response latency 150ms via multithreading and @Async
- Automated ETL pipelines (Python) — eliminated 80% of manual data-handling effort
- Redesigned MS SQL Server schemas for 10+ modules using DDD principles
- Tech: Spring Security, JWT, MS SQL Server, Python, Multithreading, @Async, DDD

### Associate Software Engineer — Wipro, Mumbai (Feb 2022 – Jan 2024)
- Developed Java/Spring Boot/Hibernate backend services across full SDLC
- Delivered 15+ RESTful APIs; SQL rewrites improved performance by 30%
- Agile collaboration in 7-person team using Jira and GitHub
- Tech: Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate, REST APIs, Agile, Jira

## Key Projects
1. **FinTech Trading Platform:** Real-time algo-trading backend — Kite Connect OAuth, WebSocket tick broadcast, Razorpay wallet (GST), automated PDF payouts on AWS S3
2. **Healthcare Data Platform:** JWT-secured REST APIs, Python ETL pipelines, 30% throughput gain, 40% faster integration
3. **Multi-Channel Notification Engine:** Centralized async hub — FCM V1, WhatsApp API, SMTP, non-blocking @Async dispatch
4. **Live Video Conferencing:** 100MS SDK with dynamic JWT tokens, EdTech course tracking, YouTube Data API
5. **Security Hardening:** Parameterized queries replacing HQL concatenation, @PreAuthorize RBAC, multi-tenant access control
6. **Database Performance Optimization:** MS SQL Server schema redesign (DDD), indexing strategies that halved report generation time

## Certifications
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
- Google Cloud: Introduction to Generative AI
